title: rubus × granulatiformis
intro: Rubus × granulatiformis, a hybrid of the blackberry and raspberry, is a type of bramble bush native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × granulatiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive function. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, jam, or syrup, and can also be used fresh in salads or as a topping for desserts.
